judgeScores.justification: The parser has a critical architectural flaw: it splits input by lines before parsing, making it impossible to handle newlines within quoted fields (requirement #4). It also completely lacks streaming support (requirement #6) and uses `any` instead of proper generics (requirement #7). While the code is readable and tests have meaningful assertions covering many edge cases, they fail to test the quoted-newline scenario, missing the most complex CSV parsing challenge. The addition of aggregation methods (sum, average, groupBy) shows creativity but doesn't compensate for missing core requirements.
